response: The email announces April highlights, including surpassing 10K monthly active users, closing a $8M Series A term sheet at a $40M pre-money valuation, and hiring a VP of Sales, while also reporting an MRR of $85K (+12% MoM) and an 11-month runway post-raise, with fundraising closing on May 10. The founders emphasize these milestones and key metrics to update investors.
